shirt.clue: common garment for the upper body with sleeves

pants.clue: garment for the lower body with two legs

dress.clue: one-piece garment for women and girls

sock.clue: soft garment worn on the foot inside shoes

glove.clue: covering for the hand with separate parts for fingers

boot.clue: sturdy shoe that covers the foot and ankle

scarf.clue: strip of fabric worn around the neck

belt.clue: strip of leather or fabric worn around the waist

tie.clue: strip of fabric worn around the collar of a shirt

sweater.clue: knitted garment for the upper body

shorts.clue: trousers that end above the knees

vest.clue: sleeveless garment worn over a shirt

bra.clue: undergarment worn to support the breasts

underwear.clue: garments worn next to the skin under outer clothes

tights.clue: close-fitting garment covering the legs and waist

tunic.clue: loose-fitting garment reaching to the hips or knees

sari.clue: traditional garment worn by women in South Asia

poncho.clue: outer garment like a blanket with a hole for the head

cardigan.clue: knitted sweater that opens at the front

blazer.clue: type of jacket resembling a suit coat but cut more casually

parka.clue: large windproof jacket with a hood

overcoat.clue: long, heavy coat worn over other clothes

sandal.clue: light shoe consisting of a sole held by straps

moccasin.clue: soft leather shoe with the sole and sides made of one piece

espadrille.clue: light canvas shoe with a plaited fiber sole

fedora.clue: soft felt hat with a curled brim

beret.clue: round flattish cap of felt or cloth

cap.clue: kind of soft flat hat with a peak

top.clue: any garment worn on the upper body

culottes.clue: women's knee-length trousers cut to look like a skirt

dufflecoat.clue: coat made of thick woolly material with toggle fastenings

peacoat.clue: short, double-breasted overcoat of coarse woolen cloth

gaiter.clue: protective covering for the lower leg

corset.clue: tight-fitting undergarment to shape the figure

bodysuit.clue: one-piece form-fitting garment covering the torso
